ErrorSources.name: Miscellaneous
ErrorSources.label: TES_MISC
ErrorSources.description: Contains all miscellaneous and generic errors

errors.name: Operation Aborted
errors.label: TER_MISC_ABORT
errors.description: The operation was aborted

errors.name: File Create Failed
errors.label: TER_MISC_CREATE_FILE_FAILED
errors.description: The file could not be created

errors.name: File Open Failed
errors.label: TER_MISC_OPEN_FILE_FAILED
errors.description: The file could not be opened
errors.cause: Varies.  PCIe link failure with probe could cause system files to be missing.  Could also be unable to open a video clip.

errors.name: Invalid File
errors.label: TER_MISC_INVALID_FILE
errors.description: The file has invalid format

errors.name: File Not Open
errors.label: TER_MISC_FILE_NOT_OPEN
errors.description: The file is not open

errors.name: Write Failed
errors.label: TER_MISC_WRITE_FAILED
errors.description: The write operation failed

errors.name: Not Implemented
errors.label: TER_MISC_NOT_IMPLEMENTED
errors.description: The method is not implemented

errors.name: Busy
errors.label: TER_MISC_BUSY
errors.description: Busy: The operation could not be performed

errors.name: Invalid Parameter
errors.label: TER_MISC_PARAM
errors.description: One or more parameters are either null or out of range

errors.name: Invalid Permission
errors.label: TER_MISC_PERMISSION
errors.description: Permission is not granted to perform the operation

ErrorSources.name: Dau Hardware
ErrorSources.label: TES_DAU_HW
ErrorSources.description: Errors generated from the Dau hardware

errors.name: Power Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_PWR
errors.description: HV power supply monitor fault detected

errors.name: MSI Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_MSI
errors.description: There was an MSI error in the Dau

errors.name: Transmitter Fault
errors.label: TER_DAU_TXC
errors.description: There was a fault in the transmitter

errors.name: PCIe Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_PCIE
errors.description: There was PCIe error detected from the Dau

errors.name: Streaming Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_STREAMING
errors.description: An error occurred in the Dau while Streaming

errors.name: Sequence Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_SEQUENCE
errors.description: An error occurred in the Dau while processing the Sequence

errors.name: Motion Sensor Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_MOTION_SENSOR
errors.description: Invalid WHO_AM_I register reading

errors.name: Memory Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_MEM_ACCESS
errors.description: Dau Register or memory access error

errors.name: Unknown Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_UNKNOWN
errors.description: Unknown Dau error

errors.name: ASIC Error
errors.label: TER_DAU_ASIC_CHECK
errors.description: ASIC integrity check fail after multiple power up retry cycles

ErrorSources.name: Tablet Hardware
ErrorSources.label: TES_TABLET_HW
ErrorSources.description: Errors unique to the Thor tablet hardware

errors.name: Puck Open Failure
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_OPEN
errors.description: Failed to access the Puck

errors.name: Puck Scan Failure
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_SCAN
errors.description: Failed to put the Puck in scanning mode

errors.name: Puck Configuration Failure
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_CONFIG
errors.description: Failed to configure the Puck

errors.name: Puck Firmware
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_FIRMWARE
errors.description: The Puck firmware needs to be updated

errors.name: Puck Update Firmware
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_UPDATE_FIRMWARE
errors.description: The Puck firmware update failed

errors.name: Puck Update Firmware Busy
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_UPDATE_FIRMWARE_BUSY
errors.description: The Puck firmware is already in progress

errors.__comment: This entry is a success code for completion of a firmware udpate.  It is not an error code.
errors.name: Puck Update Firmware Update Complete
errors.label: TER_TABLET_PUCK_UPDATE_FIRMWARE_COMPLETE
errors.description: The Puck firmware update completed

ErrorSources.name: Thermal
ErrorSources.label: TES_THERMAL
ErrorSources.description: Thermal warnings/errors from Thor tablet and Dau

errors.name: Probe Thermal High
errors.label: TER_THERMAL_PROBE
errors.description: The probe is too hot

errors.name: Tablet Thermal High
errors.label: TER_THERMAL_TABLET
errors.description: The tablet is too hot

errors.name: Probe Thermal Fail
errors.label: TER_THERMAL_PROBE_FAIL
errors.description: The probe thermal sensor failed
errors.cause: The thermal sensor may be faulty or the flex circuit may be loose or broken.

errors.name: Tablet Thermal Fail
errors.label: TER_THERMAL_TABLET_FAIL
errors.description: The tablet thermal sensor failed
errors.cause: The thermal sensor may be faulty or the flex circuit may be loose or broken.

ErrorSources.name: Imaging Engine
ErrorSources.label: TES_IMAGE_ENG
ErrorSources.description: Errors from the Ultrasound Imaging Engine

errors.name: Underflow
errors.label: TER_IE_UNDERFLOW
errors.description: Data Underflow

errors.name: Overflow
errors.label: TER_IE_OVERFLOW
errors.description: Data Overflow
errors.cause: The system could not keep up with the incoming data from the probe.  It is possible that the CPU was throttled due to low battery.

errors.name: Scan Converter Sources
errors.label: TER_IE_SCAN_CONVERTER_SOURCES
errors.description: Unable to load the Scan Converter Sources

errors.name: UPS Extract
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_EXTRACT
errors.description: Unable to extract the UPS

errors.name: UPS Open
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_OPEN
errors.description: Unable to open the UPS

errors.name: UPS Access
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_ACCESS
errors.description: Error accessing the UPS

errors.name: DMA Open
errors.label: TER_IE_DMA_OPEN
errors.description: Unable to open the DMA buffer

errors.name: DAU Power
errors.label: TER_IE_DAU_POWER
errors.description: Unable to power up the DAU

errors.name: DAU Power
errors.label: TER_IE_DAU_POWER_REBOOT
errors.description: A reboot is needed to restore connection to Dau

errors.name: DAU Memory
errors.label: TER_IE_DAU_MEM
errors.description: Unable to map DAU memory

errors.name: Signal Handler Init
errors.label: TER_IE_SIGHANDLE_INIT
errors.description: Unable to initialize the Signal Handler

errors.name: TBF Init
errors.label: TER_IE_TBF_INIT
errors.description: Unable to initialize the TBF

errors.name: SSE Init
errors.label: TER_IE_SSE_INIT
errors.description: Unable to initialize the SSE

errors.name: DAU Closed
errors.label: TER_IE_DAU_CLOSED
errors.description: The DAU is closed

errors.name: Invalid Gain Value
errors.label: TER_IE_GAIN
errors.description: Gain value must be between 0 and 100

errors.name: Invalid Image Parameters
errors.label: TER_IE_IMAGE_PARAM
errors.description: Cannot locate an Imaging Case from the supplied parameters

errors.name: Invalid Operation - Running
errors.label: TER_IE_OPERATION_RUNNING
errors.description: The operation is invalid while running

errors.name: Invalid Operation - Stopped
errors.label: TER_IE_OPERATION_STOPPED
errors.description: The operation is invalid while stopped

errors.name: Image Processor - Init Failed
errors.label: TER_IE_IMAGE_PROCESSOR_INIT
errors.description: Failed to initialize Image Processor

errors.name: Cine Buffer - Init Failed
errors.label: TER_IE_CINE_BUFFER_INIT
errors.description: Failed to initialize Cine Buffer

errors.name: Cine Viewer - Init Failed
errors.label: TER_IE_CINE_VIEWER_INIT
errors.description: Failed to initialize Cine Viewer

errors.name: Inference Engine - Init Failed
errors.label: TER_IE_INFERENCE_ENGINE_INIT
errors.description: Failed to initialize Inference Engine

errors.name: Null FIFO
errors.label: TER_IE_DMA_FIFO_NULL
errors.description: The DMA FIFO is Null

errors.name: Cine Viewer - Refresh Failed
errors.label: TER_IE_CINE_VIEWER_REFRESH
errors.description: Failed to refresh Cine Viewer

errors.name: USB Init
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_INIT
errors.description: Unable to initialize the USB Dau

errors.name: USB Start
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_START
errors.description: Unable to start imaging on USB Dau

errors.name: USB Error
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_ERROR
errors.description: There was a USB error communicating with the Dau

errors.name: USB Timed Out
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_TIMED_OUT
errors.description: USB transfer timed out

errors.name: USB Stalled
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_STALL
errors.description: USB transfer stalled

errors.name: USB Overflow
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_OVERFLOW
errors.description: USB data overflowed

errors.name: Sequencer Stalled
errors.label: TER_IE_SEQ_STALLED
errors.description: Sequencer did not stop in expected time frame

errors.name: Sequence blob error
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_NULL_BLOB
errors.description: Failed to read sequence blob from UPS

errors.name: Invalid sequence blob
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_INVALID_BLOB
errors.description: Size of sequence blob is invalid

errors.name: LLE Sequence load error
errors.label: TER_IE_SEQ_LLE_LOAD_FAILURE
errors.description: Failed to load sequence linked list

errors.name: PLD Sequence load error
errors.label: TER_IE_SEQ_PLD_LOAD_FAILURE
errors.description: Failed to load sequence payload

errors.name: UPS read error
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_READ_FAILURE
errors.description: Error occurred retrieving a parameter from UPS

errors.name: Invalid FOV
errors.label: TER_IE_INVALID_FOV
errors.description: Error occurred retrieving FOV

errors.name: No Active Stages
errors.label: TER_IE_NO_ACTIVE_STAGES
errors.description: Image Processor is engaged with no active processing stage

errors.name: Invalid Header
errors.label: TER_IE_INVALID_HEADER
errors.description: Frame header count did not match the expected value

errors.name: Unsupported Imaging Mode
errors.label: TER_IE_IMAGING_MODE
errors.description: Unsupported imaging mode

errors.name: UPS Integrity
errors.label: TER_IE_UPS_INTEGRITY
errors.description: UPS integrity check failed

errors.name: Font File Extract
errors.label: TER_IE_FONT_EXTRACT
errors.description: Fail to extract the font file

errors.name: Font File Open
errors.label: TER_IE_FONT_OPEN
errors.description: Unable to open the font file

errors.name: DA/ECG Frame Index Mismatch
errors.label: TER_IE_DAECG_FRAME_INDEX
errors.description: DA/ECG frame index did not match image frame index

errors.name: Invalid Colorflow parameter
errors.label: TER_IE_COLORFLOW_PARAM
errors.description: Error in the computation of colorflow beam parameters

errors.name: USB Cable Disconnected
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_NO_DEVICE
errors.description: USB Device disconnected from Host

errors.name: Invalid TLV Detected
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_TLV_INVALID
errors.description: Error in TLV format

errors.name: Invalid TLV Structure
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_TLV_ERROR
errors.description: Error in TLV Parsing

errors.name: Invalid TLV parameter
errors.label: TER_IE_USB_TLV_BADPARAMETER
errors.description: Error in TLV Protocol Parameters

errors.name: Unsupported Probe
errors.label: TER_IE_UNSUPPORTED_PROBE
errors.description: Unsupported probe

errors.name: Context Failure
errors.label: TER_UMGR_CONTEXT
errors.description: Unable to create or initialize the Context

errors.name: Remote Exception
errors.label: TER_UMGR_REMOTE
errors.description: There was a RemoteException error.  Check the cause.

errors.name: Dau Closed
errors.label: TER_UMGR_DAU_CLOSED
errors.description: The Dau is closed.  A new instance must be created and opened.

errors.name: Invalid Parameter
errors.label: TER_UMGR_INVALID_PARAM
errors.description: One of the required parameters is null

errors.name: Native Window
errors.label: TER_UMGR_NATIVE_WINDOW
errors.description: Unable to get native window from supplied surface

errors.name: Asset Manager
errors.label: TER_UMGR_ASSETMGR
errors.description: Unable to get native Asset Manager from supplied parameter

errors.name: Dau Exists
errors.label: TER_UMGR_DAU_EXISTS
errors.description: A Dau instance already exists

errors.name: Service Access
errors.label: TER_UMGR_SVC_ACCESS
errors.description: Could not access the Ultrasound Service

errors.name: Player Not Attached
errors.label: TER_UMGR_PLAYER_NOT_ATTACHED
errors.description: The Ultrasound Player is not attached to the Cine Buffer

errors.name: Puck Exists
errors.label: TER_UMGR_PUCK_EXISTS
errors.description: A Puck instance already exists

errors.name: Thor Only
errors.label: TER_UMGR_THOR_ONLY
errors.description: This operation is only available on the Thor Tablet

errors.name: Puck Closed
errors.label: TER_UMGR_PUCK_CLOSED
errors.description: The Puck is closed.  A new instance must be created and opened.

errors.name: Dau Not Attached
errors.label: TER_UMGR_DAU_ATTACHED
errors.description: The Dau is not connected.

errors.name: USB Manager
errors.label: TER_UMGR_USB_MANAGER
errors.description: Could not access USB Manager.

errors.name: USB Device
errors.label: TER_UMGR_USB_DEVICE
errors.description: Could not open the USB device.

errors.name: Too many UTPs
errors.label: TER_APIMGR_NUM_UTPS
errors.description: Number of UTPs exceeds limit

errors.name: Invalid UTP string
errors.label: TER_APIMGR_UTP_STRING
errors.description: Parsing of UTP string obtained from API table failed

errors.name: UTP ID not found
errors.label: TER_APIMGR_UTPID
errors.description: Failed to find a matching UTP ID in UPS

errors.name: Input Vector Setup
errors.label: TER_APIMGR_INPUT_VECTOR
errors.description: Failed to setup input vector

errors.name: AP&I Reference Data
errors.label: TER_APIMGR_CORRUPTED_REF_DATA
errors.description: AP&I reference data might be corrupted

errors.name: Model load error
errors.label: TER_AI_MODEL_LOAD
errors.description: An AI model failed to load

errors.name: Model run error
errors.label: TER_AI_MODEL_RUN
errors.description: An AI model failed to run

errors.name: Frame ID failure
errors.label: TER_AI_FRAME_ID
errors.description: Failed to identify either ED or ES frame (or both)

errors.name: Frame ID warning
errors.label: TER_AI_FRAME_ID_WARN
errors.description: Detected ED or ES frame may be invalid. Recommend manual verification

errors.name: Segmentation failure
errors.label: TER_AI_SEGMENTATION
errors.description: Failed to segment the requested item

errors.name: Smart capture clip too short
errors.label: TER_AI_SC_NOFRAMES
errors.description: Current clip is too short for smart capture

errors.name: Smart capture no range found
errors.label: TER_AI_SC_NO_VALID_RANGE
errors.description: No clip range met smart capture requirements

errors.name: LV not found
errors.label: TER_AI_LV_NOT_FOUND
errors.description: No LV region found by AI

errors.name: Multiple LV
errors.label: TER_AI_MULTIPLE_LV
errors.description: Multiple possible LV regions found by AI

errors.name: LV too small
errors.label: TER_AI_LV_TOO_SMALL
errors.description: LV region is too small

errors.name: LV uncertainty error
errors.label: TER_AI_LV_UNCERTAINTY_ERROR
errors.description: Uncertainty in LV segmentation above threshold

errors.name: A4C foreshortened
